case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. VS. RICHARD KAZMIERCZAK ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT KAZMIERCZAK, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-03-2017

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17135009) AS TO DEFENDANT KAZMIERCZAK, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAZMIERCZAK, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL $2,281.52 PRINCIPAL, $294.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.52, SEE SCANNED DOC
